privileged_info_summary: Task rotate_45@1 uses a real Unsplash image (800x533 JPEG) to test 45-degree rotation in GIMP. The verifier uses multiple detection methods and accepts rotations within ±1° (perfect, score 100), ±3° (excellent, score 90), or ±5° (good, score 75). However, the README.md document contains scoring discrepancies: it claims a pass threshold of 85% but the code passes rotations at 75% or higher; it claims score ranges of 85-99% for ±3° and 70-84% for ±5°, but the code assigns fixed scores of 90 and 75 respectively. The timeout is 90 seconds with max 6 steps.
